title: Mitsubishi UFJ Capital and Sony Back Semiconductor Firm LENZO in 500M JPY Capital Injection
tags: Everimpact secures investment from the EU and Mitsubishi UFJ Capital to expand the World’s First Real-Time GHG Data NetworkEverimpact, the climate tech company building the world’s first real-time greenhouse gas (GHG) data network, has secured strategic investment from EIT Urban Mobility (an initiative of the European Institute of Innovation & Technology), a body of the European Union, and Mitsubishi UFJ Capital, the venture capital arm of Japan’sJapan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
